name: 有丝分裂与减数分裂
subject: biology
domain_name: 遗传与进化 / Genetics & Evolution / Genetics & Evolution
curriculum_points: HS-LS1-4: Use a model to illustrate the role of cellular division (mitosis) and differentiation in producing and maintaining complex organisms.

HS-LS3-2: Make and defend a claim based on evidence that inheritable genetic variations may result from (1) new genetic combinations through meiosis, (2) viable errors occurring during replication, and/or (3) mutations caused by environmental factors.

interactive_resources.code_hint: Canvas 生物过程动画：细胞/分子/生态系统等可视化模拟
interactive_resources.description: Canvas/JS 生物过程可视化模拟

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「有丝分裂与减数分裂」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer: 应答扣课标要点：HS-LS1-4: Use a model to illustrate the role of cellular division (mitosis) and differentiation in producing and maintai…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem: 用因果链解释：HS-LS3-2: Make and defend a claim based on evidence that inheritable genetic var… 对理解「有丝分裂与减数分裂」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
